white.description: white, gray and black names have been removed

magenta50.description: Following color names and hex colors have been removed

documentationBlue.description: Used to color all brand button disabled state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

documentationPink.description: Used to color all brand button default state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

documentationPurple.description: Used to color all brand button hover state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

documentationGreen.description: Used to color all brand button pressed state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

marketingWhite.description: Secondary, white container (and sometimes page) background.

marketingSofiBlue.description: Special use, SoFi blue page and container backgrounds.

marketingEggplant.description: Special use, SoFi blue page and container backgrounds.

marketingInk.description: Special use, SoFi blue page and container backgrounds.

contentLinkSecondary.description: Use for inline text links (text link in legal copy).

contentIndicatorSelected.description: Used for text and glyphs, on state in tab navigation.

contentOnLight.description: Primary text and glyphs that reside on dark surfaces, photography or illustration.

contentSuccess.description: Text and glyphs communicating success (success banners).

contentPositive.description: Text and glyphs communicating positive movement.

contentOnDark.description: Primary text and glyphs that reside on dark surfaces, photography or illustration.

contentDisabled.description: Primary text and glyphs that reside on dark surfaces, photography or illustration.

contentHint.description: Used for hint text prior to user input in Text Input component.

contentStatusBar.description: Used only for device status content (iOS time, signal, wifi, battery).

contentPrimaryInverse.description: Used for selector pills or other elements with medium to dark surfaces.

contentLinkPrimary.description: Use for default, standalone text links.

contentInfo.description: Text and glyphs communicating information (info banners).

contentTip.description: Text and glyphs communicating tips (tip banners) and new items, information.

contentCaution.description: Text and glyphs communicating caution (caution banners).

contentDanger.description: Text and glyphs communicating warning (warning banners).

contentNegative.description: Text and glyphs communicating negative movement.

contentIndicatorUnselected.description: Used for text and glyphs, off state in tab navigation.

ioskeypadKeysSecondary.description: Used to color all brand button hover state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

ioskeypadShadow.description: Used to color all brand button pressed state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

ioskeypadContent.description: Used to color all brand button pressed state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

ioskeypadSurface.description: Used to color all brand button default state elements (except primary state text and glyphs).

strokeDividePrimary.description: Default horizontal and vertical rules dividing content over surface-primary.

strokePositiveDefault.description: Horizontal and vertical rules dividing content communicating positive movement.

strokeNegativeDefault.description: Horizontal and vertical rules dividing content communicating negative movement.

strokeIndicatorUnselectedDefault.description: Used for horizontal rules beneath content, off state in tab navigation.

strokeIndicatorGhost.description: Used for horizontal rules beneath content, off state in tab navigation.

strokeDivideSecondary.description: Default horizontal and vertical rules dividing content over surface-secondary.

strokeIndicatorSelected.description: Used for horizontal rules beneath content, on state in tab navigation.

strokeEdge.description: Used to define edge of certain containers

strokeBrand.description: Used for some hover and focused states

strokeIndicatorPressed.description: Used for pressed states of controls and more.

surfaceScrollHandle.description: Used for pills that sit over their corresponding surface color

surfaceElevatedHover.description: Secondary, white container (and sometimes page) background.

surfaceGhostOnDark.description: Used to fill containers (like status pills) that reside on dark surfaces, photography or illustration.

surfaceInfoDefault.description: Used to fill containers that contain content communicating information (info banners)

surfaceTipDiminish.description: Used for pills that sit over their corresponding surface color

surfaceSuccessDiminish.description: Used for pills that sit over their corresponding surface color

surfaceSub.description: Special use, SoFi blue page and container backgrounds.

surfaceNegativeDiminish.description: Used to fill containers that contain content communicating negative movement (performance pills).

surfaceScrim.description: Used to fill background on overlays and bottom sheets

surfaceIndicatorUnselected.description: Used for off state of pagination indicator.

surfaceCautionDefault.description: Used to fill containers that contain content communicating caution (caution banners)

surfaceInfoLabel.description: Apply this token to the containers housing subheaders.

surfaceIndicatorRange.description: sed to highlight the in-between dates in the range variant of the date picker, indicating the selected date span.

surfaceOverlay.description: Used as a blocking layer beneath a modal or other popover content
